channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: The American Dream
item.description: We honor the United States ahead of its 250th anniversary with stories about American heroes and traditions. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares ...

item.title: Nine dead, 60 injured in nine mass shootings across the US
item.description: Over a violent weekend, at least nine mass shootings occurred nationwide, resulting in eight deaths and at least 60 injuries, officials reported.

item.title: Supreme Court to review Alaska's seizure of plane over six-pack of beer
item.description: Pilot Kenneth Jouppi claims confiscating his 1969 Cessna violates the Eighth Amendment's Excessive Fines Clause.

item.title: Key Arizona primaries to watch today
item.description: Arizona has traditionally leaned Republican, with six of its nine House seats held by Republicans.
